ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "time_published" TEXT /* Publication timestamp of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score representing popularity or upvotes */,
  "is_dead" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is currently dead (not accessible) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is marked as deleted */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source from which the article is aggregated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source website */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the article's thumbnail image */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to read the article in minutes */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been viewed */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is premium content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for content filtering */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or short description */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is approved by a moderator */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been edited */,
  "last_edited_at" TEXT /* Last time the comment was edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vote is active (i.e., not retracted) */,
  "is_premium_vote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vote is from a premium user */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote (for premium users, this could be higher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., technology, health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the category name */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the category was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the preference */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the preference */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preference is enabled or disabled */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., category, author) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., specific author name) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the preference was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
